name: lpu-full-audit
description: Scrape LPU marketing + accreditation pages, then education claim audit + HITL

steps.text: LPU full audit: scrape public pages + claim hygiene. Not educational or medical advice.

steps.prompt:
Using skill education-claim-audit and knowledge/education/lpu-credential-claims.md plus any scrape-*.md under knowledge/education/, produce a full claim audit of Lifestyle Prescriptions University:
1) Verdict first
2) Claims vs evidence table
3) Who issues M.A./Ph.D. (LPU brand vs EIU-Paris validation)
4) ASIC / Wyoming / NBHWC / IBLM status map
5) Funding urgency claims
6) Primary register checks next
7) One concrete risk of trusting marketing as-is
Do not invent accreditations. Not educational or medical advice.

steps.action: Acknowledge audit is not a recommendation to enroll or pay tuition
steps.detail: Human confirms this is claim hygiene only; primary verification still required.
